summary: Iteration 29 - Complete LOTTOLAB system verification. All 4 roles login successfully. Company Admin shows 193 Open Lotteries. Vendeur shows 26 Haiti lotteries with 🇭🇹 flag. Ticket print has no IMPRIMER button and shows VALIDÉ status. Super Admin Global Schedules shows 403 schedules in UI (API has Pydantic validation issue).

critical.issue: Returns 500 error due to Pydantic validation - some schedules in DB missing required fields (draw_name, open_time, close_time, draw_time)
critical.note: Frontend handles this gracefully and shows 403 schedules

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in table - minor HTML structure issue from dynamic rendering

action_items: Fix GlobalScheduleEnhanced model to make draw_name, open_time, close_time, draw_time optional with defaults
Or clean up database schedules to ensure all have required fields
critical_code_review_comments: The GlobalScheduleEnhanced Pydantic model requires fields that some DB records don't have - should use Optional with defaults

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (14/16 tests passed - 2 failed due to global-schedules API)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Global Schedules API has Pydantic validation issue but UI works. 26 Haiti lotteries displayed with flag. Ticket print has no IMPRIMER button.

super_admin_global_schedules_api.details: API returns 500 due to Pydantic validation

supervisor_agents.details: Shows agent list with Marie Dupont

vendeur_nouvelle_vente.details: Shows 26 open lotteries with Haiti flag filter

vendeur_haiti_lotteries.details: 26 Haiti lotteries with 🇭🇹 flag, sorted first

vendeur_bet_form.details: Number input, bet type buttons, amount input, add to cart all present

ticket_print_no_imprimer.details: No IMPRIMER button in ticket HTML

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/device/config - Returns 26+ Haiti lotteries with flag_type=HAITI
GET /api/ticket/print/{id} - Returns HTML without IMPRIMER button, with VALIDÉ status
